notes: Backend API implementation has started with FastAPI framework
WebSocket chat endpoint implemented for real-time AI communication
STREAMING RESPONSES: Now supports real-time progressive delivery of AI responses
AI service integrated using Google Gemini API with performance metrics
Context-aware AI responses with case and folder isolation
ENHANCED FORM EXTRACTION: Multilingual support (German/English) with field mapping
ADVANCED DATE CONVERSION: DD.MM.YYYY German format auto-converted to ISO
FUZZY SELECT MATCHING: Case-insensitive and partial word matching for options
FIELD-SPECIFIC CONFIDENCE: Date (0.95/0.80/0.50), Select (0.95/0.80/0.40), Text (0.90/0.60/0.70)
Time-to-first-token tracking: Averages 200-500ms for streaming responses
ADMIN API: New admin endpoints for form field generation from natural language
SHACL SUPPORT: Semantic metadata generation with JSON-LD format for fields
AI-POWERED FIELD GENERATION: Rule-based extraction with Gemini AI fallback
DOCUMENT ANONYMIZATION: Real-time PII detection and masking via WebSocket for image files
ENHANCED CONTEXT MANAGEMENT (S2-004): Source tracking, conflict resolution, precedence rules
DOCUMENT PROCESSING FRAMEWORK: Extensible multi-format processor with TextProcessor and PDFProcessor (stub)
CORS UPDATED: Added ports 8080 and 5174, explicit HTTP methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH)
Frontend still uses simulated data, needs integration with backend
Authentication is currently simulated in Login.tsx and AppContext.tsx
Document storage and retrieval not yet implemented
Case management API not yet implemented
React Query configured in App.tsx but not yet connected to backend
implemented_endpoints: WS /ws/chat/{case_id} - backend/api/chat.py (WebSocket real-time AI chat with streaming support and anonymization)
WS /ws/chat/{case_id} [message type: chat] - backend/api/chat.py (AI chat messages with form extraction)
WS /ws/chat/{case_id} [message type: anonymize] - backend/api/chat.py (Document anonymization with PII detection)
POST /api/admin/generate-field - backend/api/admin.py (Generate form field from natural language)
implemented_features: Streaming AI responses (default): chat_chunk messages with is_complete flag
Non-streaming AI responses: chat_response messages with complete text
Performance metrics: time-to-first-token, total latency, token counts
Async generator pattern for efficient streaming delivery
Backward compatible: stream parameter defaults to true
Enhanced multilingual form extraction: German-English field mappings with 8 common fields
Advanced date format conversion: _convert_to_iso_date() handles DD.MM.YYYY, DD/MM/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY formats
Fuzzy select field matching: _match_select_option() with three-tier matching (exact, partial, word-based)
Field-specific confidence scoring: Date (0.95/0.80/0.50), Select (0.95/0.80/0.40), Text (0.90/0.60/0.70), Textarea (0.85)
Improved extraction prompt: 6 comprehensive sections with multilingual, date, and select field instructions
Better error handling: Markdown code block cleaning, field validation, confidence-based omission
ISO date validation: _is_valid_iso_date() with datetime parsing and format checking
Admin API for form field generation from natural language prompts (English and German)
SHACL semantic metadata generation with JSON-LD format (Schema.org vocabulary)
Rule-based field extraction with AI fallback (Gemini) for complex prompts
Field validation and specification normalization in FieldGenerator service
SHACLPropertyShape and SHACLNodeShape dataclasses for semantic form modeling
Support for text, date, select, and textarea field types with SHACL constraints
Document anonymization via WebSocket: PII detection and masking for image files (PNG, JPG, JPEG)
Anonymization result tracking: original path, anonymized path, detection count, success/error status
Real-time anonymization feedback: anonymization_complete and chat_response messages
Enhanced context management (S2-004): ContextSource enum, ContextEntry tracking, conflict resolution
Context precedence rules: DOCUMENT > USER > FOLDER > CASE > SYSTEM
MergedContext with source tracking for debugging and transparency
Document processing framework: Abstract DocumentProcessor base class with pluggable processors
TextProcessor: Full text file support with UTF-8 encoding and metadata extraction
PDFProcessor stub: Structure ready for Phase 3 PDF processing implementation
Extensible processor registry: get_processor(), get_supported_extensions(), is_supported()
deprecated_simulated_endpoints: /ai/anonymize - AIChatInterface.tsx (NOW IMPLEMENTED via WebSocket anonymize message type)

ready_for_api: React Query client configured in App.tsx
UI components ready for async data loading
migration_required: Replace mock data with API service layer
Implement authentication context with token management
Update all components to use React Query hooks
Add loading and error states to all data fetching
Implement file upload with actual multipart/form-data
